center.name: 波图格萨州
center.summary: 波图格萨州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Short-crested flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brunnescens has a limited range in the Llanos of extreme northeastern Colombia into Venezuela from Táchira and Portuguesa east to northwestern Bolívar. The short-crested flycatcher inhabits a variety of landscapes, most of which are somewhat open

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: brunnescens has a limited range in the Llanos of extreme northeastern Colombia into Venezuela from Táchira and Portuguesa east to northwestern Bolívar. The short-crested flycatcher inhabits a variety of landscapes, most of which are somewhat open
